name: HRA_EVAL_PCPN_QSTNR_V
query: SELECT HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.EVAL_PARTICIPANT_ID, HRQ_QSTNR_RESPONSES.TOTAL_SCORE, QSTNR_VERSION_NUM FROM HRQ_QSTNR_RESPONSES, HRQ_QSTNR_PARTICIPANTS, HRA_EVALUATIONS, HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS, HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRQ_QSTNR_PARTICIPANTS.SUBJECT_ID = TO_CHAR(HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID) AND HRQ_QSTNR_PARTICIPANTS.PARTICIPANT_ID = TO_CHAR(HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.EVAL_PARTICIPANT_ID) AND HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVAL_PARTICIPANTS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'QUESTIONNAIRE' AND HRQ_QSTNR_PARTICIPANTS.QSTNR_PARTICIPANT_ID = HRQ_QSTNR_RESPONSES.QSTNR_PARTICIPANT_ID AND HRQ_QSTNR_RESPONSES.ATTEMPT_NUM = ( SELECT MAX(ATTEMPT_NUM) FROM HRQ_QSTNR_RESPONSES HRQ_QSTNR_RESPONSES1 WHERE HRQ_QSTNR_RESPONSES.QSTNR_PARTICIPANT_ID = HRQ_QSTNR_RESPONSES1.QSTNR_PARTICIPANT_ID )
